name: Broccoli and Tofu in Spicy Almond Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, whisk together the almond butter and hot water until you have a uniform mixture.
2. Whisk in the remaining sauce ingredients (cider vinegar, tamari soy sauce, blackstrap molasses, and cayenne) and set aside.
3. Stir-fry half the ginger and half the garlic in 1 tablespoon oil.
4. Add tofu chunks to the pan and stir-fry for 5-8 minutes until golden brown.
5. Mix the tofu with the sauce.
6. Wipe the wok clean, then stir-fry the remaining ginger and garlic in another 2 tablespoons of oil.
7. Add onions and sauté for about 5 minutes until they are tender.
8. Add broccoli and cashews to the pan, along with tamari soy sauce, and stir-fry until the broccoli is bright green.
9. Toss the sauteed vegetables with the sauce, mixing in the minced scallions as you toss.
10. Serve over rice.
